underlying_goal: Implement animated clock hands (Task 5) and fullscreen/ESC key handling (Task 6) for a Bauhaus-style SwiftUI screensaver project
friction_detail: Minor compiler issues including CGFloat type casting, var-to-let warning, and unused variable warning required fixes.
brief_summary: User needed Tasks 5 and 6 of BauhasClock implemented (animated clock hands and fullscreen/ESC handling), and both were completed with clean builds and commits.
